manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are participating in a collaborative guessing game.
The goal is to find out whether this grid and another picture only I can see, are the same.
Please describe your grid first. Then, I will provide my description and we can ask each other questions about the grids to figure out whether they are the same. Now start your short grid description with "DESCRIPTION:" followed by the description. Do not add anything else. This is your grid:
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢
▢ ▢ X X ▢
X X X X X
▢ ▢ X X ▢
▢ ▢ X ▢ ▢

message.content: line.DESCRIPTION: A 5x5 grid with a vertical line of X's in the center column, a horizontal line of X's across the middle row, and an additional X at the center of the grid, forming a plus sign with a thicker middle. All other cells are empty (▢).
message.reasoning: We need to comply: start with "DESCRIPTION:" then description, no extra text. Provide grid description. Should be short. Probably just textual description of pattern. Follow instruction: Do not add anything else. So only that
